entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @gphadnis2000, This error is in the external package `gensim`, not in my code, so it is a bit difficult for me to say what caused this particular error. Can you check what is there in the directory, where this package downloads the files to, i.e. in `/home/user/gensim-data/`?

Then try deleting that directory

rm -rf /home/user/gensim-data/

and restart that failed cell in the Jupyter Notebook.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I've already turned on private message.

Br,

Emma.tran

entry.title: Re: Understanding SuccessFactors Pay Scale Structure and its related features
entry.content:
Hello and thanks a lot for the detailed showcase of these features,

 

when I use the Tariff Change functionality, I am able to update the pay component amount based on the PayScaleLevel assignment (e.g. going from €100 to €150 in DAILY SALARY) but other rules associated to CompInfo are not being triggered

for example, we have a pay component using an OnSave rule to obtain YEARLY SALARY from DAILY SALARY, but that rule is not getting triggered by the Tariff Changes functionality and so employees will have the new DAILY SALARY but keep the old YEARLY SALARY

 

do you know any workaround for this issue?

entry.title: The Tale of the Disappearing Data: An Epic Developer Saga from the World of CAP 😆
entry.content:
Picture this: you're deep in the trenches of SAP Cloud Application Programming, crafting a shiny new CAP application for a customer. You've sprinkled in some initial master data for rapid prototyping, confident that everything is running smoothly. After some time, you hand over the application to your customer, eagerly awaiting their high-quality master data input using the Fiori Elements UI to prepare for some real world testing.

But as fate would have it, a bug reared its ugly head during testing. No problem, you think! You roll up your sleeves and deploy a bugfix. Victory is imminent...or so it seems. Suddenly, disaster strikes! All the master data is gone, replaced with your initial csv-data. Panic sets in as you remember the infamous HDI deployment caveat for csv data.

You scramble to apologize profusely to the customer, hastily moving all your csv files away from the db folder. Phew, crisis averted! The customer diligently re-enters their high-quality master data, and you prepare for another deployment. But alas, the nightmare isn't over. The master data vanishes again, leaving you bewildered and the customer frustrated.

Determined to conquer this beast, you dive into the depths of the HDI container, deleting the entire instance on Cloud Foundry in a desperate bid to solve the issue once and for all. In the aftermath of this chaos, inspiration strikes. From the ashes of your trials, the HDI Container Backup & Restore Application is born, a testament to the relentless spirit of a developer who refused to let data disappear without a fight.

And thus, a hero emerged from the world of SAP, armed with a new tool and a story to tell at this developer contest. May your backups be ever plentiful, and your data forever safe!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I have been working on SAP for the past one year in Ariba Suite.

I want show case my skills brighter with a certificate and as a addition.requesting to consider and provide the free certification attempt as i have completed my learning journey prior.

Thanks&Regards,

VenkataPraveena.

entry.title: Re: HiCan we install SAP Business One Web Client on a ser...
entry.content: That document references the "SAP Business One Administrator's Guide" which says virtually nothing. Prove me wrong, but as far as I've seen the only diversification options are to install the database engine and on one server, the server components (the Web Client is a server component) on a second server, and the more complete Windows SBO Client on the terminal server or PC. Then the network administrator must manage the NAT externally. I think the Apache/Tomcat crap is so convoluted that it forces a monolithic installation process.

entry.title: Delete orphaned tile in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
I've created a KPI and a Drilldown Report using the app "Manage KPIs and Reports" (F2814). 
Then I used the "Visualize" tab in the report to create a Launchpad Tile showing some KPI value. I assigned the tile to a catalog and group - everything worked fine, tile was showing on the launchpad.

Later, I decided that I want to remove the tile, report and KPI. I used the app again to delete the report and the KPI. This worked fine, both are gone from the list. The auto-generated tile was not visible on the launchpad anymore. Unfortunatly, after that I realized that in the Launchpad Customizing, the tile is still existing in the catalog. When I click on it, nothing happens. The "Configure" and "Delete" buttons are greyed out:

I understand that you are not supposed to be able to change/delete tiles that are generated by reports from the app. They are supposed to be deleted when the report is deleted, but something must have gone wrong. Now I have this orphaned tile. Any other way to remove this dead tile from the Launchpad Customizing other than editing directly in the database? 

SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2020
SAPUI5: 1.84.7 (202102111006)

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Your last example made me scratch my head, and then smile @mvinci 

I checked that EDE is the NYSE's "Empire District Electric Company". So, this is where "Empire" is coming from 🙂 

Maybe you should have tried what is there in "Athens" similar to "pasta" in "Rome"? 😋

How did you find this week's content? Was it helpful to learn anything new?

Best regards,

nguyen_phuong

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.

entry.title: Re: How to Bill Freight Costs to Customer in S4/HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,  thank you for the post. I am currently testing SAP Transportation Management (TM) in a Public Cloud environment and unfortunately, I cannot link freight costs to the billing document. In Public Cloud, I only have the Freight (Manual) condition type, and I have tried using this in my sales order, but it doesn't work. Do you have any other tips?

Additionally, after posting accruals the freight settlement document creation,  purchase order process correctly, but the billing document does not reflect these costs.

entry.title: USERTEXT NCLOB datatype
entry.content:
Hi, 

Can anyone solve this issue. USERTEXT NCLOB when use in group by got issue. How do need to add in group by clause. Can give me some clear solution.

entry.title: No Optimization Server Available (SAP TM)
entry.content:
Good morning,

When our Transport Planners are using the Transportation Cockpit, they were getting error messages which state, "No Optimization Server Available". These messages are then being prefixed with TVSS when creating Freight Orders and TSPS when in the Freight Order and attempting to assign Carriers.

We have refreshed our server, created new scheduled jobs to clear cache/log entries overnight, yet this issue is occurring daily since Monday AM. 

We had a system outage on Sunday for system re-architecture which seems to be the driver for this issue, however we are struggling to identify the root cause and correct it.

This is affecting our Operations team when trying to ship loads.

Would anyone have any advice relating to the Optimization Server and this issue?

Thank you for your help in advance,

Nick

entry.title: Re: Calls for Public CAP-API using BTP Scheduler not working
entry.content:
Find following output from SAP OSS Ticket with answers from BTP Scheduler, XSSEC and CAP Teams.

It was quite difficult to discuss this topic.

From XSSEC team / perspective, there is no error.

As far as CAP team analyzed, they found out that BTP Scheduler instance sends an invalid JWT token to the CAP endpoint. And as all CAP handlers validate the authorization header if there is one (even if public or unprotected), the framework aborts with an validation error. As designed.

From BTP Scheduler team however, the response is that calling a public (unprotected) endpoint from Scheduler is not suppported. And it is not possible to disable the scheduler job from sending this invalid JWT token in the authorization header.

Funny thing is that this case worked for almost one year and then stopped suddenly. Unfortunately the root change has not been found why it stopped working or why it has worked before.

Therefore I close this question and leave it unresolved.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: The task was extremely guided; the only difficulty was finding words that yielded a meaningful result. I would have preferred a slightly less guided exercise because I retain information better when I have to search a bit on my own rather than simply executing tasks without any reflection. I would have preferred something that looks more to a real challenge.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
@Vitaliy-R 
Executing the scripts was straightforward, and I didn't encounter any obstacles. However, I believe it would be more beneficial for learning if there were elements that required us to think and implement solutions on our own.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: let me try that option

entry.title: Create a custom section fragment with event handler in Fiori List Report
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am trying to create a fragment and call handler event inside that, in a Fiori list report template. I am using build code, full stack application.

I tried adding the fragment manually as well as from the Page Floor Plan Editor. I checked few blogs and references for them generate event is coming.

# https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-elements-fpm-exercises-codejam/blob/main/chapters/03-custom-section-via-extension-point/readme.md

# https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/unlocking-possibilities-extending-fiori-elements-apps-with-the-flexible/ba-p/13580440

@MioYasutake @mertuytun @PeterSpielvogel

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
Hi Sumit, unfortunately I never did a POC on that and actual there is no time for. Also I guess there is a need to adapt the task ui. Regarding the callback. I found some example coding (but didn´t run it) in our FORMABSENC- Demo Flexworkflow Scenario for the on_creation_callback that may help.

 

 

 

 

 

DATA(lv_task_id) = io_current_activity->get_task_id( ). 
IF lv_task_id = 'TS77408433'. 
" The application object could be fetched 
" DATA(lv_appl_obj) = io_context->get_leading_object_reference( ). 
" The following code will set an approval comment depending on the value of a step property 

DATA(lt_step_properties) = io_current_activity->if_swf_flex_ifs_run_component~get_properties( ). 
IF line_exists( lt_step_properties[ id = cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-id ] ). 
DATA(lo_formabsenc) = CAST cl_swf_formabsenc( cl_swf_formabsenc=>bi_persistent~find_by_lpor( CONV #( io_context->get_leading_object_reference( ) ) ) ). 
IF lo_formabsenc IS NOT BOUND. RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING textid = cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception=>leading_object_key_error. 
ENDIF. 
DATA(ls_formabsenc) = lo_formabsenc->get_detail( ). 
CASE lt_step_properties[ id = cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-id ]-value. "value field contains a key (if a fixed value list is used) or the value itself (if no value list is used) WHEN cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-value_id_1. ls_formabsenc-approval_comment = 'Stage 1 reached' ##NO_TEXT. WHEN cl_swf_flex_def_appl_lra=>cs_prop_milestone-value_id_2. ls_formabsenc-approval_comment = 'Stage 2 reached' ##NO_TEXT. ENDCASE. 
" Update leading object here 
TRY.
lo_formabsenc->update_background( 
EXPORTING
 is_swxformabs = ls_formabsenc iv_do_commit = abap_false ). 
CATCH cx_bo_error INTO DATA(lx_bo_error). 
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING previous = lx_bo_error. ENDTRY. ENDIF. 
TRY. 
io_context->get_task_container( )->set( 
EXPORTING 
name = 'dummy' 
value = 'A' 
). 
CATCH cx_swf_cnt_cont_access_denied cx_swf_cnt_elem_access_denied cx_swf_cnt_elem_not_found cx_swf_cnt_elem_type_conflict cx_swf_cnt_unit_type_conflict cx_swf_cnt_elem_def_invalid cx_swf_cnt_container INTO DATA(lx_container_write). 
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_swf_flex_ifs_run_exception EXPORTING previous = lx_container_write. 
ENDTRY.

** --- Simulate MMPUR_WFL_CONTEXT_ENHANCE BAdI to set step priority ----
*    DATA(lt_execution_list) = io_current_activity->get_execution_results( ).
*    DATA(lt_work_items_id) = VALUE swwtwiid( FOR line IN lt_execution_list ( line-wi_id ) ).
*    APPEND io_context->get_wi_id( ) TO lt_work_items_id . "Main workitem priority also needs to be set
*    LOOP AT lt_work_items_id INTO DATA(ls_work_item_id).
*      CALL FUNCTION 'SWW_WI_PRIORITY_CHANGE'
*        EXPORTING
*          priority  = 2
*          wi_id     = ls_work_item_id
*          do_commit = ' '
**       AUTHORIZATION_CHECKED       = ' '
**       PRECONDITIONS_CHECKED       = ' '
**       PROPAGATE_TO_FLOW           = ' '
**       FUNCNAME                    = ' '
*        EXCEPTIONS
*          OTHERS    = 0.
*    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Hi Joerg,

entry.title: User Id level authorization for the monitor report change attributes
entry.content:
How to control user id level authorization for the Monitor report option change attributes


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: User Id level authorization for the monitor report ch...
entry.content:
You can control the authorization for change attributes, There is a authorization methods for monitor,

AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT '/SCWM/MO'
      ID '/SCWM/LGNU' FIELD iv_lgnum
      ID '/SCWM/MONI' FIELD iv_monitor
      ID '/SCWM/OBCL' FIELD ls_method_def-obcls
      ID '/SCWM/METH' FIELD ls_method_def-method.

The check is in the code:  /SCWM/CL_WME_MONITOR_DB -> GET_METHODS

If the user has no rights then the method won't be displayed.

entry.title: Re: List Report: external navigation with parameters not...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

did you manage to find a solution on this? I'm stuck in the same situation: parameter are always passed as strings and are not evaluated.

Also this thread is referring to the same problem https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/app-to-app-external-navigation-binding-configuration/qaq-p/12335821

Thanks!

Chiara

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Excellent exercise - maybe too easy as the notebooks were super cool and prompt (too perfect) 😀

Only one query had an error (i am investigating the error in my account). I loaded 3m records on my BTP internal tenant (not trial... )

workspaces-ws-476rm
 
 
* hana://userkey=myDevChallenger (hdbcli.dbapi.OperationalError) (4, 'cannot allocate enough memory: Allocation failed; Reason: configured statement memory limit from global configuration reached (SAP Note 3191224)') [SQL: SELECT RN, WORD, RELATED_WORD, SIMILARITY_SCORE, L2DISTANCE FROM ( SELECT B.WORD AS WORD, A.WORD AS RELATED_WORD, COSINE_SIMILARITY(A.WV, B.WV) AS SIMILARITY_SCORE, L2DISTANCE(A.WV, B.WV) AS L2DISTANCE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.WORD ORDER BY COSINE_SIMILARITY(A.WV, B.WV) DESC) AS RN FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" A, (SELECT WV, WORD FROM "DEVCHALLENGER"."GOOGLE_NEWS" WHERE WORD IN ('cat', 'CAT')) B WHERE A.WORD <> B.WORD ) AS RankedWords WHERE RN <= 5 ORDER BY WORD DESC, SIMILARITY_SCORE DESC;] (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: If Rome has pasta, Athens has noodles...

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Hi Joerg, there is a small addendum to this topic for the URL adjustment. In table "CRMV_IC_BORADM" you can change the assignment (Url) for logical systems like S4C_FIORI. Best regards, Joerg

entry.title: Re: Messages in RAP List Report
entry.content:
I solved the problem by using the parameter %global of the reported structure.

But I notice that this parameter is not available in all versions

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback @MioYasutake and @Cocquerel !

It seems I overestimated the difficulty of running this, as I assumed many people would be trying different aspects of this exercise for the very first time and I wanted to make it easier.

I see it has become too easy and resulted in a tutorial instead of a challenge...

Ok, I will try to make it more challenging next week 🤓

entry.title: Re: Task / Process Step Reference ID
entry.content:
Hi Ram,

I asked our consulting-team for an advice for you and received this response:

There is no standard you can use, but a custom solution would be possible via SAP Signavio Process Governance and scripts. Some logic need to be defined how these numbers should be created and probably they'll need consulting help to implement this.

 

Kind regards,
Dennis

entry.title: Re: Thailand e-Tax Invoice & e-Receipt

Please help advising how e-Invoicing and e-receipt can be applied on SAP Bydesign.

Regards,
Watcharaphon N.

entry.title: Re: My Code Connect 2024 Experience
entry.content: Thanks for sharing y our experience with Code Connect. I'm delighted to hear that you enjoyed it. It was truly wonderful to finally meet you in person. and I hope that this won't be our last encounter!

entry.title: Re: Batch management new logic from S/4 HANA 1809. Batch management indicator (Plant)
entry.content: amazing, thanks for the great post.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback @mvinci and it is in line with what @MioYasutake and @Cocquerel wrote. Note taken: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/submissions-for-quot-sap-hana-cloud-multi-model-quot-developer-challenge/m-p/13729352/highlight/true#M2028484

I reduced the number of loaded records from 3000000 to 100000 because, for 3 million records, I used a HANA instance bigger than what we all have in the Trial. Plus, it takes quite a long time for single-threaded processing to work with a 3M dataset. It was at the pick of BAS trial dev spaces as well, when it comes to disk and RAM.

Maybe that can be taken as a challenge now, how to tune the environment to work with 3M complete dataset in Trial 🤓

entry.title: Re: Cost planning integration between Controlling and Finance table ACDOCP
entry.content:
Hi, there is a note regarding category 42.

3356231 - Secondary CE not getting transferred from ACDOCP to KP06 - R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Point taken. On top of what I replied to you and @MioYasutake below already, I must contest it took me 4 hours to make the 3CosMul calculation work:

((1+ COSINE_SIMILARITY("V4"."WV", "V3"."WV"))/2 * (1+COSINE_SIMILARITY("V4"."WV", "V2"."WV"))/2) / ((1+COSINE_SIMILARITY("V4"."WV", "V1"."WV"))/2 + 0.000001) AS "3COSMUL_SCORE"

for the analogy queries.

Sounds, I should have left it to your next time as a challenge 🤓

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP ERP: HowTo-Guide (Part 2 - First use case)
entry.content: @smohan29 but what's in the SLG1 entry now?

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: You need to find suitable place where do you want to enhance standard logic. Only you or requestor of this change knows where. If you do not know, then try debug your test cases and look for a place. Maybe there is a BADI or userexit somewhere? Or at worst use Enhancements (implicit can be put in begining/end of FORMs, functions, methods...).

entry.title: Difference between regacy data and migrated data to S4 in open purchase order
entry.content:
We migrated the Open purchase order data using Migration Cockpit in S4HANA Cloud, we found purchase amount is different from regacy data which we described in migration template file for some record.

And also, I confirmed we didnot change the value intentionally after migration.

Could you tell us the reason which the amounts were changed from the values in template files?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
What also sometimes helps in custom workflow dev is the Programming Exit on activity Level.

*How do the program exits work?
*To change alternatives of the user decision at runtime dynamically (for each *work item), you can define an ABAP class here that supports interface *IF_SWF_IFS_WORKITEM_EXIT.

*At runtime, method IF_SWF_IFS_WORKITEM_EXIT~EVENT_RAISED is called multiple *times. Here you can define source code that is run for different time points *of the work item processing.

*To delete or change the alternatives, your code must be run at the time *point SWFCO_EVENT_BEFORE_DECISION.

*Example: Class CL_SWH_T_DECISION_EXIT from workflow definition WS77400143 "WF_Verify141"

Method IF_SWF_IFS_WORKITEM_EXIT~EVENT_RAISED.
  data lt_decialts type IF_WAPI_WORKITEM_CONTEXT=>swrtdecialts.
  if im_event_name = IF_SWF_IFS_DECISION_EXIT~C_EVTTYP_BEFORE_DECISION.
    call method IM_WORKITEM_CONTEXT->get_decision_alts
       importing et_decialts = lt_decialts.
*   --- hide alternative 0001 and 0002 ---
    delete lt_decialts where altkey <> '0003'.
    call method IM_WORKITEM_CONTEXT->set_decision_alts
       exporting it_decialts = lt_decialts.
  endif.
endmethod.

entry.title: Can we add a new value to readiness field without impacting existing nominations
entry.content:
Hi,

 

There are 4 values till now in the readiness scale, can we add a new value at the end of readiness scale without any impact.

 

If we add a new field in between the values, then there would be an impact as the existing nominations need to be re-imported.

 

What if the new value is added at the end of the existing readiness value.

Please tag @SameeraSS,  if you have any answer.

 

Your response could be highly appreciated.

 

Thanks,

Sameera

entry.title: SAP Business Network for Logistics In-Between Release on May 31st, 2024
entry.content:
A few days ago, there was an ‘in-between’ release for SAP Business Network for Logistics. On the What’s New overview in SAP Help Portal, it is just two entries, but it marks an important milestone. These functions are the first evidence of the convergence of the previously separate networks in the areas of procurement and supply chain collaboration, assets, and logistics.

From now on, maintenance of company profile and onboarding of carriers and data contributors will be done on the new platform serving as the foundation of the SAP Business Network. This is the starting point for many integration scenarios that our customers are waiting for.

So, what has changed exactly?

1. Your company profile has moved to a new platform

All roles in SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration as well as SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, i.e. shippers, solution owners, carriers, data contributors or any other logistics service providers are affected.

The business profile has been merged with the Trading Partner Profile in SAP Business Network. When you open the ‘Manage Business Profile’ application, you will automatically be directed to the new profile.

Fields you had before are also available in the new profile (with minor changes that I will explain in this blog). In addition, there are new fields and functionality e.g. enhanced logic on mandatory fields and options to maintain more details around additional addresses and contacts.

1.1 Overview Section and Business Data

In the former ‘Manage Business Profile’ application, there was a header section and tabs for more details. On the new platform, there is an overview section and a navigation pane on the left. The overview section contains similar information to the former header section (except for LBN ID – see below 1.4).

On the new platform, business data is part of the ‘Overview Section’. Some information such as revenue, founded, employees, … is part of the top section. Below there is more business data such as product and service categories, ship-to-service-location, and industry.

 Please note: the code list for ‘Industries’ has changed. You might have to refill it with a value from the new code list.

1.2 Additional Addresses Section

In the former business partner profile, addresses were stored in a table under the tab ‘Contact Details’. Now, there is a new section for ‘Additional Addresses’ – addresses other than the main address which is part of the overview section - such as warehouses, distribution centers, etc..

When you edit additional addresses, you might notice that there are validation checks embedded for some fields e.g. VAT ID. You can also maintain contacts specific to a particular address.

Navigate to SAP Help Portal for more details on how to create additional addresses.

1.3 Contacts Section

As with additional addresses, there is also a separate section for general contacts such as regional logistics managers, transportation planners, etc.. You can access it via the navigation pane on the left to create, edit or delete contacts.

 Navigate to SAP Help Portal for more details on how to manage contact information.

1.4 Finding your LBN ID

The LBN ID is required for you to be identified correctly in the network. It is not displayed on the new platform. However, you can find your LBN ID in the ‘Systems Connections’ application under ‘Manage Alternative IDs’.

 

1.5 Privacy Settings (Carriers only)

Carriers can decide if they want to make their profile visible to potential business partners and if they would like to automatically accept invites. These settings used to be part of the ‘Manage Business Profile’ application but have now been moved to the application ‘Manage Invitations’. Under ‘Settings’, you have the option to change the privacy settings. Per Default, both are set to ‘no’.

 

1.6. Summary regarding the new platform for business partner profile

The key benefits of having a new and central place for business profiles across all areas of SAP Business Network, procurement, supply chain collaboration, assets and logistics:

  • improved user experience
  • utilize one single profile to showcase your information and reflect organizational structures
  • additional functionality and profile fields
  • make your business profile accessible to potential partners and relevant stakeholders (planned roadmap item)

However, admin data (created by, changed by, …) from SAP Business Network for Logistics has not been migrated. Instead, the new platform has its own admin data. The fields are filled automatically.

And please take note of the following:

  • LBN ID is not displayed in the new profile. You can find the LBN ID in the ‘System Connections’ application.
  • The former privacy settings for carriers ‘make profile visible to potential business partners’ and ‘automatically accept connection requests’ have not yet been transferred, but have been moved to the ‘Manage Invitation’ app in SAP Business Network for Logistics 
  • For some entry fields, there are new code lists available with a mismatch in values (i.e. not all old values can be mapped 1:1 to new values). Please check the following field and potentially refill them with a value from the new code list:
    • Gross Revenue in USD
    • Employee Strength
    • Industry
    • Geographical Coverage
  • The ‘Additional Addresses’ section has added value through validation checks on a number of fields such as VAT ID (e.g. mandatory for Italy), TAX ID, GST ID (e.g. specific information required for locations in Singapore).

For more details on ‘Manage Business Profile’ go to our documentation on SAP Help Portal.

 

2. Onboarding of Carriers and Data Contributors

The account activation process has changed for new carriers that want to onboard to SAP Business Network for Logistics. The process has been simplified! Companies do no longer have to go via SAP Store.

Now, as a logistics service provider:

1.) Receive an invitation from a shipper or solution owner.

2.) Accept the invite by clicking the link in the email.

3.) Registration page opens.

4.) Click on ‘Create Account’.

 5.) Verify the auto-populated email address and proceed by editing (some information prefilled from shipper)/ creating your account.

 6.) Receive email on successful account creation.

7.) Sign in and create your business profile by clicking on the ‘Manage Business Profile’ application (for further details see above section 1).

8.) Configure additional technical users and add users to your account.

More details on Getting started with SAP Business Network for Logistics via new onboarding process can be found in our documentation on SAP Help Portal.

Please note: This process is currently only available if the shipper or solution owner uses the data center for Europe (EU10). However, if the invitation you received was sent out before release 2405 or the sender of the invitation uses a data center other than EU10, you still need to go through the previous account activation process. For more information, see Getting Started (Prior to Release 2405).

 

Please share and amplify our new feature!

---------------------

The above summarizes the May 31, 2025 ‘in-between’ release. We hope you enjoy the new capabilities. Thanks for reading the blog post and stay tuned! 

To learn more about SAP Business Network for Logistics visit SAP - Business Network for Logistics.

For further questions and feedback related to the blog, please check the Q&A area and feel free to post your questions in the link with the tag SAP Business Network for Logistics.

entry.title: Re: Statement is not accessible.
entry.content: Create a global class and e.g. a static method, where your "form routine code" is located. Call that static method in your enhancement. Then the declaration problem is delegated to the DDIC.

entry.title: Is Joule no more available in Trail Account BAS
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Trying out SAP Build Code mission - https://developers.sap.com/mission.sap-build-code-test-drive.html ran booster and can see BAS in trail account only has free(Application) plan in entilement and build-code(Application) missing. Attached screenshot.

Is Joule in Trail account BAS no more available ?

 

Regards,

Vipin.

entry.title: Re: SAP Field Service Management 2405 – AI Driven Field Service Management is here!
entry.content:
Hi 🙂
Where can the new activity sidebar be configured/ customized?
We want to prepare for 2408 and have UDF's in the sidbar wich need to be added again since they are missing in the new one.
Also e.g. the smartforms tab is missing which is at the moment accessed regularly by our users through the sidebar.

Thanks and Regards,
Urs

entry.title: Leading Orders
entry.content:
OrderRef NoSuperior OrderLeading Order
60001635   
70001688600016356000163560001635
70001689700016887000168860001635
70002621700016897000168960001635

In the table afko for the field lead.aufnr (leading order) is blank. Through CDS View I have to maintain Parent order orderno to display for its child order in the field leading order(lead.aufnr). Please help me to sort out this issue.

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE - Error during search for WM movement type (000 Q )
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked it to my movement via spro LE ->WM ->Interfaces -> Define movement types -> Assign WM Movement Type References to IM Movement Types :  

and then Define movement types -> LE-WM Interface to Inventory Management

But when I run the BAPI I get the message "Error during search for WM movement type (000 Q )"

The error is triggered at this point in the BAPI because it cannot find a line because the P_RBLVS field is empty. 

My table is filled if the field is not empty.

I don't understand why the field is empty.
Can you help me?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Reverse COGS SPLIT documents
entry.content:
Hi,

My client activated COGS split in PRD, but then realized the target account was wrong.

He wants to reverse COGS split posted documents with FB08, but gets this message:
Cancel secondary journal entry 4901345909 via its reference document entry 49074319722024.
This is impossible since it's a lot of PGI to be reversed, and goods have been delivered to customers.

Any help would be highly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content: 🤣

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database - Adjust Memory Allocation Limit
entry.content:
I am the author of this Question.

Found the answer! Resolved. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Initial Data Migration Profile in SAP Readiness Check for SAP ERP Usage and Data Profil
entry.content:
Congratulations on the new design of the Initial Data Migration Profile! It looks great and significantly enhances user experience. Thank you also for the excellent collaboration. It is fantastic to see both the SAP Readiness Check UDP and the SAP Business Transformation Center benefiting from this.

In combination with the SAP Business Transformation Center, we can now offer every customer an end-to-end lean selective data transition from ECC to S/4HANA as part of their SAP Enterprise Support Agreement, with no additional costs. 

Keep up the great work and thanks again for the great cooperation!

entry.title: Re: API Anomaly Detection in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
We're in very early state of discovering CALM.

API-Manger is in general only exposing very little data to CLAM - so it's hard to get an end-to-end view in CLAM including API-Manger.

My question/idea was mainly to have notifications from CLAM instead of using Notification Service framework. Also having all monitoring/observability in one place also, this would also enable teams to monitor multiple systems and stage from a single point.

From the anomaly detection in general, at least all anomalies should be forwarded to CLAM so the system status in CLAM could at least change to some warning state. Having data like what is normal load what was the data during anomaly would for sure be nice as well, but this might mean to replicate the dashboard completely to CALM.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to embed a program or transaction into another program?
entry.content:
Hi, there,
Are your programs linked to transactions? If so, have you considered a transaction call?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @umeshkarane welcome to SAP Community. As you live in Pune: there are a lot of community activities around India: there are location groups and community events. I would like to recommend to subscribe to the event calendar of SAP Inside Track and SAP Stammtisch, and maybe there are some events close by where you live.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database - Adjust Memory Allocation Limit
entry.content:
I am the author of this article.

Found the answer! Resolved. Thank you.

entry.title: Create a new company in FSM and update all users with no access in user policy group/person
entry.content:
Hello all! 

If I create a new FSM company, then automatically all users do have access "default" to this new company in the user policy group. Furthermore, all users are assigned to the new company as person (see screenshot below). So in the master data - persons, all users are displayed from the other company. 
Is it possible to change this default-setting? 

 

Currently I checked the FSM User API, but no batch user update is supported and the user policy group or person assignment are not included in the body parameters for the API endpoint. 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_user_api/update-user.html?locale=en-US 

Hence, do I need to manually change all users and remove the access to new company? Or is there any other option? 

Thanks. 
Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Holger_Simon welcome!

Trier must be beautiful. I never visit but both of my children did during a school outing. 😊

Enjoy your stay here - for beginners, the Resources page  with many tipps & tricks, videos and the Tour the Community tutorial is a great starting point!

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - example files can not reached
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam!

When I am trying to learn I face a problem, that if the task mention an example code that can be found in the folder of /lnr/.... I cannot reach them. 

I do not know why I can not find these objects/classes. 

If you have an advice please let me know. 

Kind regards

Máté Pál

entry.title: Re: XREF3 in MIRO disappear when the user input po
entry.content: Check the field status variant customizing (Table T004F).   It is possible that the XREF-3 Field is suppressed eg. for reconciliation accounts.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud - Central Invoice Management...
entry.content:
Hello,

To connect SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management with an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, please follow the instructions in Setting Up Invoice Processing with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management (4N6) - Applicable for SAP S/4HANA Cloud guide.

This information was sent to your IT contact person identified in the order form in an email called "Tenant Information for SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management".

Best regards,

Franck Dupas, Product Manager

entry.title: Modify MSEG-DMBTR during MIGO posting.
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Is it possible to change MSEG-DMBTR during MIGO posting ? BADI, Enhancement( whatever )

My case is that I have many accounts and total value (Qty in Unit of Entry-ERFMG)is splitted into some smaller values.  I have to modify them during MIGO.

There are some badi like MB_MIGO_BADI but it can modify total line which has to been splitted per accounts.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Why is the automatic suggestion of an Account not exe...
entry.content:
Hello,

What kind of account are you expecting?

From the error message, i see the cost distribution item is missing.

In case of invoice without PO, you need to manually select a Account Assignment Type like cost center or project task.  System will not automatically decide it for you.

entry.title: "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."
entry.content:
Hello,

I've referred to the video in the following URL "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j-2x-2Y7GGk" and deployed the Supplier Invoice Upload for Intelligent Invoice Scanning Bot (2R1) Template App. The trigger too ran successfully. Everything looked good on the BPA end, but when the process entered the Business One Phase of the process is when I have started facing a serious issue which is not letting me to complete the process.

 

Here are the details step wise.

1. I've opened the Electronic Document Import Wizard and located my invoice as I've selected the checkbox Determined and I have seen a message that stated the "Import file has been successfully determined".

2. I've clicked the drop down on the selected invoice and was able to see the invoice items successfully without any issues.

3. As suggested in the video, I have selected the option to generate all the rows and clicked next.

4. Then I have entered the summary report window that had my draft report and as I clicked on t, I was able to see the A/P Invoice - Draft. But when I have tried to save it, I got an error message which really is out of my understanding. Here's the message "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."

I've searched online to see if anyone has ever faced such an issue, but I couldn't find any leads, so decided to post it here for expert advice.

Can anyone please take a look at this and explain where things are falling out of place.

I've attached two images to explain what I'm exactly seeing on my screen. 

 

Thanks in advance,

Gautham

entry.title: Add custom fields in Freight Order Item Tab
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

The Requirement is to enhance the ITEM tab with another Column that would hold value for a custom field.

The Component Configurator is: /SCMTMS/WDCC_FORROAD_ITM

I have enhanced the /SCMTMS/D_TORRITE with the appended structure that would contain the custom field.

But the Field is not reflecting on the screen for which I believe the UI TREE needs to enhanced. The Add Column popup doesn’t reflect the custom field that I need to enhance the TREE.

Also once the field is added to the screen how do we make sure that the Data also gets reflected on screen?

Please could you help.

Thanks you in advance.

entry.title: Re: XREF1, XREF2, XREF3 in MIRO - the ultimate solution
entry.content: In case the XREF fields disapear, check Field variant customizing T004F. It will overwrite the visibility for certain status groups eg. after entering a PO-number.

entry.title: Re: Implement SSo in backoffice
entry.content:
Hi sharada1234

I am also getting the same error as yours while doing the SSO using okta with Hybris. Can you please help.

entry.content: Been there! Done that!

entry.title: workflow for Budget Approval in Project Systems (PS)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need a workflow (approval) process for the following transactions. Please guide me through the workflow set up for Project Systems (PS):

  1. Project Budget Approval = CJ32
  2. Budget Transfer Approval = CJ34
  3. Supplement Budget Approval = CJ37
  4. Budget Return = CJ38

Thanks and Regards,

Preethesh Shetty

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Messaging for SAP ERP: HowTo-Guide (Part 2 - First use case)
entry.content:
@martin_schffler 

The change events are now visible in the event mesh.

I had to activate the BC sets as per the below sap help and also add the table entries manually into the transport and move it into the testing client as per the second link. For some weird reason the entries that are created in these tables during the config never get added to the transport.

Activate BC-Sets | SAP Help Portal

Configuration Transports | SAP Help Portal

I also had to make some changes according to this post.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/data-events-scenario-with-sap-event-enablement-add-on-for-sap-s-4hana-sap/ba-p/13543356

However, the CREATE still does not even generate an event (I am unable to find any trace even in SWEL). We are hoping to raise a ticket with SAP to see why the vent is not even being triggered for the CREATE.

I got immense help from @bins2 for this and i would like to give him a special thanks!

 

Thanks,
Smohan

entry.title: Re: Configuring external IDE(BAS) in Eclipse for creating...
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm not expert from eclipse development (but i configured our SAP BAS) with your popup in your screenshot, i suppose you would have to insert (or test) the following informations : 

URL = your BAS URL

Development Space ID = your Space ID (see my screenshot)

Destination Name = Go to your Subaccount Url --> Connectivity --> Destinations and put one of your Destination Name

I hope this helps you.

Regards.

skrime

entry.title: Re: List Report: external navigation with parameters not...
entry.content: @Cmdd Unfortunately, I stopped exploring this topic further and have not found a solution.

entry.title: How to find package S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have created a task in Maintenance Planner to install S/4 HANA 2023.

All file suggested by Maintenance Planner have been downloaded and are available on the target host.

The first installation step (Install ASCS) has already been completed as well as the HANA Software installation. We have a HANA DB with SystemDB and one Tenant which are up and running.

Now, in the second installation step (Install Database Instance) we're4 asked for the location of "S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1" but this file/archive is not present in our downloaded files, neither can we find in the download area.

Does anyone have a clue where we should look for it?

Thanks in advance,

Nicole

entry.title: Record Mobile Services Network Trace Using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools
entry.content:
In the previous blog post we know how to analyze the mobile services network trace har file using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools, actually you can record the network trace using mobile backend tools directly. In this blog post, we will demonstrate how to record the network trace for mobile services using mobile backend tools.

First, login to your mobile services cockpit and ensure that feature "Mobile Network Trace" has been assigned to you mobile app:

Click the "Mobile Network Trace" feature, you will see the network trace histories inside the network trace view:

As you can see, there are already 2 network trace records for this mobile app. Let's take a look how to view the network trace records in mobile backend tools. 

First install SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools from VSCODE marketplace, and the follow the instructions to add the mobile service landscape to mobile backend tool from this blog post. Under the mobile app, open the "Network Traces" node:

Locate the network trace record you want to view and click "Download Network Trace" icon:

after the network trace record is downloaded, you should be able to view the content from the network trace analyzer:

And you can start recording the network trace from mobile backend tools directly without going to the mobile services cockpit. In order to do that, click the "Start Record Network Trace" icon in the Network Trace node:

You will see below the network trace recording UI:

If you want to include the payload in the network trace record, select "Header and Body" in the log message options and click "Start Recording" button:

Run you mobile app and perform the necessary requests to the server, and then click "Stop Recording" button on the UI:

Now you should be able to see the newly generated network trace record. Download the record and you should be able to view its content:

As a summary, in this blog post we demonstrated how to record the mobile services network trace using SAP Mobile Services Mobile Backend Tools. In addition to using the mobile services cockpit, you can record and view the network trace inside the Visual Studio Code environment without having to use third party tools.

entry.title: Unused account in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to tag  f/l account as unused in Public cloud, but I encouter this message:* No message found in T100;

Any idea?

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content: Hello, I also encounter this error. Is it possible for you to share with me the steps you took to resolve the problem?

entry.title: New Member intro - Emmanuel Katto
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am Emmanuel Katto from Uganda. I've dedicated my career to exploring the ever-evolving tech landscape. My interests range from AI and blockchain to cloud computing, and I'm always excited to dive into the latest gadgets and tech trends. I love sharing my insights through blogs, helping both beginners and experts navigate the complex world of technology.

Happy to be part of this community.

entry.title: What are the advantages of Rise with SAP Private cloud edition
entry.content:
Hi All, 

What are the advantages of Rise with SAP Private cloud edition over S/4hana on Premise system hosted in cloud ?

Regards

entry.title: The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action
entry.content:
Hi, RAP Experts,

The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action. But the similiar update for header table works. The following is the screenshots. Would you please help me on this ?

entry.title: Re: Kyma Integration with SAP Cloud Logging. Part 1: Introduction and shipping Logs
entry.content:
Thank you @Hariharan-Gandhi for the details.

I have couple of follow-up queries on the "Curation policy", 

For example, while setting up "logging instances" on Kyma, we make the retention policy  "90 days". But, with 30 days log, it reaches the maximum size and eventually, it ends up deleting the log of the application which is more than 30 days old. 

My queries are

  1. How could we avoid that?
  2. Can we set up an alert, before the system triggers a delete operation on the index?

Regards,

Sarbajeet

entry.title: Denied Party Block Function 66
entry.content:
Hi All,

Kindly i have a requirement where I need that the Vendor should not be accessed in FB60 Table while creating invoice ie. vendor need to be blocked on FI Level. The user should get the message "Vendor blocked". The vendor is already blocked on MM level and cannot create Purchase order.

Please convey suitable User exit or BADI where we may write the code for the same.

entry.title: Re: Unable to open .sapaox files
entry.content: Note 3073584 might help you as a solution.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing TM-EWM & TM-GTS integration by leveraging FEH resolution strategies
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog entry about this important topic!

You probably have a misleading type in 'When both “Target” & “Persistent” check box is enabled' as I think you meant the checkboxes 'Transient' (the systems tries to resolve the error symptoms ad hoc) and 'Persistent' (error symptoms are transferred to the Postprocessing Office (PPO) as postprocessing orders for later processing).

Could you maybe enhance the blog with some information?
For example where the error categories come from so it becomes clear how to steer for an individual enterprise service (interface) different problems, e.g., retry in case of locking issues, but no retries in case of master data issues.

entry.title: Re: Why is the automatic suggestion of an Account not exe...
entry.content:
Dear User, 

Like said below, when you are creating invoice without PO and product is free text (Items without master data), account determination will not happen automatically.

In the Business configuration work center - Implementation Projects - Open activity list - Fine Tuning - Activity - Edit Default Account Determination Group for Product Categories.

When you enter a supplier invoice or a goods receipt for a non-stock material or a service, you can specify just a product category without having to enter a particular product or service. Here, you can assign the account determination groups which the system shall use to determine the expense account to your product categories.

Here you can maintain the default account determination group for Materials and Services.

Best Regards,
Arun

entry.title: Re: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected durin...
entry.content: Maybe you have some incosistency in AWOR (history table). You can try to empty it on test database.

entry.title: Re: Cannot find future new hire employees in search even...
entry.content:
Hi Dhanush,

Please check below it may solve your problem

3290931 - Future Hire is not searchable in the People Picker and in the Global Search - SuccessFactors Platform (sap.com)

Thanks,

AM

entry.title: Re: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction '' (AWOR)
entry.content: Maybe you have some incosistency in AWOR (history table). Please try to clean it on test database.

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'Sparking Business Revolution through AI' (Virtual, 25 de Julio de 2024)
entry.content:
Virtual 

25 de Julio de 2024

Agenda

Estimado cliente,

Tenemos el placer de invitarle al Taller de Innovación SAP MaxAttention centrado en 'Sparking Business Revolution through Artificial Intelligence' que tendrá lugar virtualmente el 25 de julio de 2024. Aquí encontrará el programa actual del taller.

En un entorno en el que la inteligencia artificial está revolucionando el panorama empresarial, SAP le invita a un evento especial para descubrir cómo nuestras soluciones de IA pueden transformar su organización. Este evento contará con expertos de SAP Premium Hub CoE LAC, que compartirán estrategias y casos prácticos de uso de inteligencia artificial aplicados a diversos sectores.

Únase a los expertos de SAP Premium Engagement para conocer las capacidades de la suite SAP Business AI y cómo puede ayudarle en el camino hacia la excelencia y la revolución empresarial, con el respaldo de SAP MaxAttention.

Si desea inscribirse en este taller, póngase en contacto con maxattention@sap.com

Nuestros talleres

Estas sesiones y series de talleres se centran en un tema específico y su objetivo es permitir a nuestros clientes comprender la cartera de productos y las tecnologías innovadoras de SAP para impulsar su adopción y consumo. En concreto, ahora es más importante que nunca ayudar a las empresas a tener éxito y a responder a los mercados cambiantes transformándose en empresas inteligentes en la economía de la experiencia.

Sus comentarios

No dude en compartir sus comentarios y opiniones en la sección de comentarios que aparece a continuación.

entry.title: Re: Michal's tips: Application Interface Framework (AIF) - IDOC with custom selection criteria (inde
entry.content:
Hi Micheal,

 

I followed your steps, still i find "Undefined" for the field i added as selection criteria. I could see value in the Index Table, still in /AIF/ERR it's not able to filter the entries.

Could you please help with some tips?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Priyo

entry.title: Re: Getting Request failed with status code 500 using SAP...
entry.content: Hi Noel, many thanks for suggestion but I've already tried other request without dot or special characters.

entry.title: Re: Configuring external IDE(BAS) in Eclipse for creating...
entry.content: your BAS URL = https://<YOUR SUBDOMAIN>.<YOUR ZONE>.applicationstudio.cloud.sap

entry.title: Re: Assembly data cant be found in Work center POD.
entry.content: Hello Sayuj, I clarified and the following applies: The setting in the Manage Material application is the default that will be used if the data type in the BOM component is not maintained. However, to make the default work, the entry in the BOM component must be empty, and should not be "None". I tested and can confirm.

entry.title: Re: Project ID in Collaborative project management
entry.content:
Hello, 

As of today the SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects doesn't offer such a functionality. This is a known limitation and is already on the list of future functionalities.

Best regards

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects

entry.title: Re: Moving Widgets within pages in SAC Story 2.0
entry.content:
I'm also facing the same issue. The current functionality only allows you to move the widget between container within the same page.

According to the SAC API docs it seems like it should be possible to move objects between pages. The API "Application.moveWidget" has the functionality of moving a widget to the "first page canvas". If you can only move objects within the same page, then what is the point of this API?

If anyone can give an answer I would appreciate it.

 

API
Application.moveWidget
moveWidget(widget: Widget): void
 
Moves the widget into the first page canvas.
Parameters
widget:Widget
 
Since
2020.7

entry.title: TIME_OUT in t-code VA02 while deleting document
entry.content:
Hiya all.

We're getting TIME_OUT short dumps when deleting some SD docs via VA02. I traced the ST22, put a break-point in the exploding line, and found something weird.

The dump is raised within a LOOP in the DELETE_TEXT function module. While debugging, I found the system calls that function continually, with the it CATALOG containing one additional line each time the module is called.

I'm about to keep debugging that thing, but before that, I decided to try to get some hints from here. Maybe any of you has experienced that behaviour and can lend a hand before my brain melts.

I cannot promise I'll give you points for the right answer, but will do my best to be thankful and a good person enough to post my advances if I'll get any.

Thanks in advance,

Vic

entry.title: Re: Resource Management connection with Collaborative Pro...
entry.content:
Hi @FranciscoCosta

Collaborative project management demands are not yet possible to be planned in resource management. Resource management supports planning for demands coming from S/4 projects.

Regards,

Monisha.

entry.title: Re: C4P Project template
entry.content:
Hello, 

As of today the SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects doesn't offer such a functionality. Functionalities like 

  • Project plan import from MS Project file
  • Project plan import from external systems (SAP S/4HANA Cloud or others)
  • Project plan synchronization between SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects and SAP S/4HANA Cloud

are planned and at the moment in development. In addition to that it is planned to offer functionalities to copy project plans, which can be used to fulfill the requested template functionality. 

Best regards

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects

entry.title: use Crystal Report 2016 with a Crystal Report 2020 licence
entry.content:
Hello,

I bought SAP Crystal Reports 2020 but I have a problem opening my current report (v8.5). I tried with Crystal Report 2016 (trial version) and it works perfectly. I would like to know if it's possible to use Crystal Report 2016 with a Crystal Report 2020 licence

Thanks in advance

entry.title: BDT Erweiterung von CMS Immobilien Sichten
entry.content:
Guten Tag,

ich bin gerade dabei im Bereich CMS mithilfe von BDT Felder hinzuzufügen.
Im speziellen geht es um die CMS-Immobilien, Reiter "Gebäudeteile", Unterreiter "Beschreibung".

Hier gibt es folgende existierende Struktur im Bildaufbau:
-> Bild "RE0030 (Gebäudeteil - Beschreibung)"
    -> Abschnitt "RE0074 (Objekt Gebäudeteil - Beschreibung)"
        -> Sicht "RE0087 (Objektgebäudeteil - Bau/Versicherung Details)"
            -> Feldgruppen...

Ich möchte nun im Abschnitt RE0074 zusätzlich meine eigene Sicht hinterlegen:
-> Bild "RE0030 (Gebäudeteil - Beschreibung)"
    -> Abschnitt "RE0074 (Objekt Gebäudeteil - Beschreibung)"
        -> Sicht "RE0087 (Objektgebäudeteil - Bau/Versicherung Details)"
            -> Feldgruppen...
        -> Sicht "ZZ0087 (Meine Sicht)"
            -> Feldgruppen...

Obwohl ich das aber im BDT entsprechend customize sehe  ich meine Sicht nicht im CMS.

Ich habe auch versucht die bestehende Sich zu entfernen, aber sie wird trotzdem weiterhin angezeigt.
Das grundsätzliche Vorgehen meine ich verstanden zu haben, da ich bereits auf dem Reiter "Identifizierung" das gleiche gemacht habe und eigene Abschnitte hinzugefügt habe.

Das besondere hier scheint zu sein, dass der ganze Unter-Tabreiter wiederum Bilder enthält.
Das Bild "RE0030 (Gebäudeteil - Beschreibung)" ist auch als "Modal. Dialogfenster" gekennzechnet.
Ich weiß aber nicht was das bedeutet und ob das damit zutun hat, wieso ich meine Anpassungen nicht sehen kann.

entry.title: Re: Collaborative Project Management task assignment
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us. SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects offers such functionalities for work breakdown structures (WBS) in the project planning application. Today it is already possible to assign tasks to WBS elements and display them in the detail section within the project plan. 

Displaying Task in a Gantt chart is a known and documented functionality and will be delivered in future releases. 

Best regards

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects
